nasb.text: When Jezebel heard that Naboth had been stoned and was dead, Jezebel said to Ahab, “Arise, take possession of the vineyard of Naboth, the Jezreelite, which he refused to give you for money; for Naboth is not alive, but dead.”

esv.text: As soon as Jezebel heard that Naboth had been stoned and was dead, Jezebel said to Ahab, “Arise, take possession of the vineyard of Naboth the Jezreelite, which he refused to give you for money, for Naboth is not alive, but dead.”

cnv.text: 耶洗別聽見拿伯已經被人用石頭打死了，就對亞哈說：“你起來，去佔有那耶斯列人拿伯從前不肯收銀子給你的葡萄園，因為拿伯現在沒有命了，他已經死了。”

ccb.text: 耶洗别接到消息后，就告诉亚哈说：“耶斯列人拿伯已经死了，你去占他不肯卖给你的葡萄园吧。”
